name: tide-sun
author: cristian-milea
description: Sunrise/sunset, moon, and a cached next-tides graph.
long_description: Top strip shows today's sunrise, sunset, and the moon phase on one line, in the location's local time. Below it, a tide graph auto-fits the next three high/low tides, marking each with its time; tap Prev / Next on the phone to step through the tides, and the e-ink notes when you cross into another day. Tides come from the WorldTides API (set a free 'worldtides' API key as a secret): one sync pulls a 7-day curve for ~1 credit and caches it on the device, so the app is manual-sync — tap Sync only when the data runs low. Sunrise/sunset and moon phase are computed device-side.

secrets.label: WorldTides API key
secrets.description: Free API key from worldtides.info — powers the cached tide graph.
